options.version: Display Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit CLI version.
options.help: Show Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit CLI help.
options.interactive: Run the command in interactive mode.

help.description: Show Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit CLI help.

arguments.command: The command to get help for.

auth.login.description: Log in to Microsoft 365 or Azure account.

options.tenant: Authenticate with a specific Microsoft Entra tenant.
options.service-principal: Authenticate Azure with a credential representing a service principal
options.password: Provide client secret or a pem file with key and public certificate.

options.tenant: Authenticate with a specific Microsoft Entra tenant.

auth.logout.description: Log out of Microsoft 365 or Azure account.

auth.show.description: Display all connected Microsoft 365 and Azure accounts.

add.description: Add feature to your Microsoft 365 App.

add.spfx-web-part.description: Auto-hosted SPFx web part tightly integrated with Microsoft 365.

add.plugin.description: A plugin to extend Copilot using your APIs.

add.auth-config.description: Add Configurations to Support Actions with Authentication in Declarative Agent

add.capability.description: A capability to extend Copilot using your APIs.

set.description: Set configurations for your Microsoft Teams application.

set.sensitivityLabel.description: Set sensitivity label for the Declarative Agent app.

create.sample.description: Create an app from existing sample.

collaborator.description: Check, grant and list permissions for who can access and manage Microsoft 365 App and Microsoft Entra application.

deploy.description: Run the deploy stage in m365agents.yml or m365agents.local.yml.

doctor.description: Prerequisite checker for building Microsoft 365 Apps.

entra-app.description: Manage the Microsoft Entra app in the current application.

entra-app.update.description: Update the Microsoft Entra app in the current application.

env.add.description: Add a new environment by copying from the specified environment.

list.description: List available Microsoft 365 App templates and samples.

options.tag: Specifies the tag to filter the samples.

options.format: Specifies the format of the results.

launchinfo.description: Get launch information of an acquired M365 App.

options.title-id: Title ID of the acquired M365 App.
options.manifest-id: Manifest ID of the acquired M365 App.

install.description: Sideload a given application package across Microsoft 365.

options.file-path: Path to the App manifest zip package.
options.xml-path: Path to the XML manifest xml file.

provision.description: Run the provision stage in m365agents.yml or m365agents.local.yml.

package.description: Build your Microsoft 365 App into a package for publishing.

options.output-zip-path: Specifies the output path of the zipped app package, defaults to '${folder}/appPackage/build/appPackage.${env}.zip'.
options.output-manifest-path: Specifies the output path of the generated manifest path, defaults to '${folder}/appPackage/build/manifest.${env}.json'

publish.description: Run the publish stage in m365agents.yml.

share.description: Run the share stage in m365agents.yml.

uninstall.description: Clean up resources associated with Manifest ID, Title ID, or an environment in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit generated project. Resources include app registration in Teams Developer Portal, bot registration in Bot Framework Portal, and uploaded custom apps in Microsoft 365 apps.

options.mode: Choose a way to clean up resources.
options.env: The specific environment in the project created by Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
options.folder: Project path to uninstall, only used in env mode.

update.description: Update the Microsoft 365 App manifest to Teams Developer Portal.

upgrade.description: Upgrade the project to work with the latest version of Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.

options.force: Force upgrade the project to work with the latest version of Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.

validate.description: Validate the Microsoft 365 App using manifest schema, validation rules, or test cases.
